title: reseda buhseana var. dshebeli
intro: Reseda buhseana var. dshebeli is a lesser-known variety of the reed-like flowering plant Reseda buhseana, native to the Middle East. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Reseda buhseana var. dshebeli include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions and respiratory issues. In terms of herbal preparations, it is often used in infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
